top_signals.title: Gold Steadies After Weekly Gain as Rate-Hike Worries Recede
top_signals.summary: Gold steadied after posting its first weekly advance since May, supported by reduced expectations that the US Federal Reserve will hike interest rates.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Ukraine's Zelenskiy says he spoke to Trump, calls for 'American resolve' to help end war - Reuters
top_signals.summary: Ukraine's Zelenskiy says he spoke to Trump, calls for 'American resolve' to help end war  Reuters
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Chip Stock Bulls Count on Samsung to Soothe AI Trade Jitters
top_signals.summary: A wild ride for global chip stocks in recent weeks has left investors looking for fresh validation of the artificial intelligence trade. Samsung Electronics Co. may provide just that on Tuesday.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Barstool's Portnoy plans to hold bitcoin down to zero after timing it wrong every time
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: World Cup gives London restaurants and retailers Deliveroo boost
top_signals.summary: England’s World Cup campaign has delivered a boost for restaurants and retailers across London, with new Deliveroo data showing a sharp increase in orders during the Three Lions’ group-stage matches. Exclusive figures shared with City AM show BBQ orders more than doubled across the capital during England’s matches against Croatia, Ghana and Panama, while picnic-related [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
